response.objective_caption: Bare deciduous trees stand in dark silhouette along the lower edge of the frame beneath a cloudy twilight sky, with diffuse pale light filtering through layered cloud formations.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Bare deciduous trees stand in dark silhouette against a cloudy sky rendered in muted, desaturated gray-blue tones with extremely low vibrancy.
